prompt: Create a hyper-realistic sports advertising poster shot from an extreme wide-angle, low courtside perspective on a bright sunny day at an outdoor tennis court. In the extreme foreground, a male tennis player lunges dramatically toward the camera while thrusting a large matte cobalt-blue insulated water bottle toward the viewer, making the bottle the dominant object in the frame. The bottle is covered with visible condensation droplets and has a brushed metallic gold cap, with the white logo text {argument name="brand name" default="Aqua"} printed near the bottom. The athlete wears a clean white athletic t-shirt, bright blue tennis shorts, white wristbands, white socks, and white tennis shoes. His other arm stretches back holding a black tennis racket, with 1 bright yellow-green tennis ball visible near the racket on the right side of the image. The pose should feel dynamic and athletic, with one leg bent deeply and the other extended in a wide lunge across the blue hard court. Use strong midday sunlight, crisp shadows, vivid saturated blues, and a clear cloudless sky, with green trees and a dark fence line in the distant background. Compose it like a premium hydration brand campaign, with sharp focus on the bottle and athlete, dramatic foreshortening, commercial polish, and energetic motion. Add clean white ad typography integrated onto the court surface in the lower half: a smaller line reading {argument name="headline intro" default="Play Hard"}, a very large bold line reading {argument name="headline main" default="Hydrate Smart"}, and a smaller subheading reading {argument name="tagline" default="Hydration that keeps up with every move."}. Place the {argument name="brand name" default="Aqua"} logo again in white at the top right, and a small website URL in white at the bottom right reading {argument name="website" default="www.aqua.com"}.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张超写实的体育广告海报，采用极广角、低机位的场边视角，背景为阳光明媚的户外网球场。在极近的前景中，一名男性网球运动员向镜头做出戏剧性的跨步动作，同时将一个大型哑光钴蓝色保温水瓶推向观众，使水瓶成为画面中的主体。瓶身布满清晰的冷凝水珠，配有拉丝金属金色瓶盖，底部印有白色品牌标识文字 {argument name="brand name" default="Aqua"}。运动员身穿干净的白色运动 T 恤、亮蓝色网球短裤，佩戴白色护腕，穿着白色运动袜和网球鞋。他的另一只手臂向后伸展，握着一把黑色网球拍，画面右侧球拍附近可见 1 个明亮的黄绿色网球。姿势应充满动感与力量感，一条腿深蹲，另一条腿在蓝色硬地球场上大跨度伸展。利用强烈的正午阳光、清晰的阴影、鲜艳饱和的蓝色以及万里无云的晴空，远处背景为绿树和深色围栏。构图应呈现出高端补水品牌广告的质感，聚焦于水瓶与运动员，运用戏剧性的透视缩短效果，展现商业级的精致感与活力。在画面下半部分的球场表面融入简洁的白色广告排版：较小的一行文字为 {argument name="headline intro" default="Play Hard"}，非常醒目的大号粗体文字为 {argument name="headline main" default="Hydrate Smart"}，以及较小的副标题 {argument name="tagline" default="Hydration that keeps up with every move."}。在右上角再次放置 {argument name="brand name" default="Aqua"} 的白色品牌 Logo，并在右下角放置一个小型白色网站 URL {argument name="website" default="www.aqua.com"}。

breakdown.creativeCore: 网球补水广告海报：此提示词用于生成一张大胆、写实的户外网球广告，通过极具张力的强制透视手法突出品牌水瓶，适用于体育营销和饮料推广活动。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
